title: Ta-Ree
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Ta-ree.jpg|thumb|[[Yapi]] using Ta-Ree]]
'''Ta-Ree''' refers to a manifestation of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] that was located exclusively in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]].

After the [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]] disaster that forced the ancient [[Kathol (species)|Kathol]] to enter the [[Lifewell]] in order to survive, the very fabric of space and of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] itself were twisted in the region. This allowed many beings native to the sector to use this 'spirit energy' and thus have [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]]. However, this form of the Force was only usable within the Kathol sector under most circumstances, and when the Kathol were freed from servitude they made sure that the Ta-Ree energy would never be usable again, but some managed to keep the Ta-Ree energy. Some of Ta-ree's unusual powers were the [[Pyrospray]] and the [[Shadowstrike]].
